title: Corpse Party
main_page_extract:
Corpse Party (Japanese: コープスパーティー, Hepburn: Kōpusu Pātī) is a horror video game originally created by Makoto Kedōin and eventually developed by Team GrisGris. Blending elements and genres of supernatural horror, survival horror, adventure, and doujin soft, the video game often features high school students who attempt to escape after becoming trapped in an abandoned, parallel school, haunted by a vengeful spirit in a red dress.
The video game has spawned several mangas, an anime OVA, drama CDs, theme park attractions, and two live action films.


== History ==
The first game in the franchise was developed using the RPG Maker software version RPG Tsukūru Dante 98 and released on April 22, 1996, for the PC-9801. It was followed by three remakes:

Corpse Party: NewChapter, which was released incomplete for mobile phones from October 3, 2006, to December 26, 2007
Corpse Party: Blood Covered, which was released for Microsoft Windows from March 8, 2008, to July 28, 2011. A Re-release was made on PC Steam in 2016, under the title Corpse Party.
